workflows-reference.purpose: Provide Vertical Slice plus CUPID/YAGNI/KISS workflows for Compass tasks.

documentation-context.rule: Read docs/architecture/vertical-slice-architecture.md and docs/architecture/feature-slice-structure.md before design or implementation.
Read docs/foundation/cupid-yagni-principles.md before creating abstractions or shared code.
Read relevant docs/modules notes for the touched feature area.

workflow.description: Add one feature-local behavior through a vertical slice.

enforcement.rule: Run phases sequentially: slice discovery, slice design, implementation.
Execute exactly one behavior slice per workflow.
Do not create global layers or shared abstractions before current callers prove the need.
Design should be lightweight enough to keep implementation local.
Implementation must stop after each verified slice checkpoint.

phase.name: slice-discovery
phase.purpose: Name the user-visible command, query, or workflow and decide the smallest useful slice.

actions.action: Read the vertical slice architecture, feature-slice structure, CUPID/YAGNI, and incremental test docs.
Restate the behavior as a command, query, endpoint, or workflow step.
Identify the feature area and proposed slice folder.
Split unrelated behaviors into pending slices.
State non-goals and what will stay local for now.

phase-output.non-goals: Behaviors not included in this slice.

phase.name: slice-design
phase.purpose: Design only the local slice shape and closest useful tests.

actions.action: Define request or command or query input, handler responsibility, result or response, local persistence needs, and emitted events if any.
Apply CUPID: composable, single-purpose, predictable, idiomatic, and domain-based names.
Apply YAGNI: reject abstractions without current callers.
Create an incremental test matrix: local policy, handler, persistence, endpoint, or workflow tests as needed.

phase-output.slice-structure: Files and ownership inside the slice.
phase-output.test-matrix: Closest useful tests from common path to failure paths.

phase.name: implementation
phase.purpose: Implement the approved vertical slice through small checkpoints.

actions.action: Keep code mostly inside the selected slice folder.
Implement the closest behavior first, then adapters or persistence only when needed.
Broaden verification only when shared code, platform, public contracts, or persistence changed.
Stop and ask before implementing the next slice.

phase-output.shared-changes: Shared code changed and why, or none.

workflow.evidence: Approved slice design, local behavior tests, shared-code justification if any, and docs update when boundaries change.

steps.step: Add or update the closest behavior test for that slice.
Change code locally inside the slice first.
Extract shared code only when current callers prove the need.
Run slice tests, then broader tests only if boundaries changed.

workflow.evidence: Slice-local tests and explicit shared-change justification.

steps.step: Reproduce the bug in the owning slice.
Add a focused regression test at the closest useful level.
Run slice tests and broaden only when shared code changed.

workflow.evidence: Regression test, local fix, and targeted verification.

steps.step: Identify whether the change is a slice boundary, shared platform, or cross-slice contract change.
Compare local duplication, shared extraction, and platform abstraction.
Document why YAGNI no longer applies if extracting shared code.
Implement in one affected slice or shared area at a time.
Run affected slice tests and broader boundary tests.

workflow.evidence: Decision record, caller evidence, affected slice tests, and boundary verification.
